textByHashes.704e68810136121e0a72bad32ea622f6076c644e: Well, it's... interesting and complex. Definitely an experience.
textByHashes.b2097ee58dbef6596d36336d1f0bb5ec005ce58f: Seriously, human? You couldn't just do this out of kindness? For the enjoyment of the journey and the feeling of helping another?
textByHashes.800b955243a9bd11efffefafa30dbaa60114c483: You weren't helping me out of appreciation for my work here and the service I provide?
textByHashes.afb2fa180609e5e18068d045fb8944ce7c137d1a: Or, at the least, to push the boundaries of culinary achievement?
textByHashes.ab35da4802e2eb1820991ebff91f646208584e6b: I suppose you can have a bite if you like?
textByHashes.9124d8fe04bb15a93713929070898ed13806aedd: Oh, thank you! Have a great day!
textByHashes.4906678c2e20f2fa8955e9eefe3af229b7187613: Hello, ! What can I do for you?
textByHashes.fd8fb82dde34bd3b0e92da015ee1aab7a9ca3e04: Protecting the camp from wildlife and thieves.
textByHashes.c829a1e0b25e145073a729cd4285d269dc7b8608: Hah! Why would I rush up there when you foolish humans are more than willing to throw yourself into its jaws?
textByHashes.3c561dadc5273a16fbb9567ede4fc98b7ef12283: Besides, someone needs to keep an eye on the happenings down here.
textByHashes.69ad7d340d0d7ee11cddd4d303d7714976b371e5: Seriously though, , do be careful up there.
textByHashes.7b7457e25ba7fcc2d8c8116df40988dc6a8a6fbb: You know, I think I've had enough. Thanks, though.
textByHashes.b355808eb37897a3d5c9fafef85043dd0f34f39e: Oh, more antelope. You know, I think I've had enough. Thanks, though.
